mapper.insert: INSERT INTO selection_result(cn_category, br_category, demand_score, growth_score, competition_score, profit_score, total_score, reason) VALUES(#{param1},#{param2},#{param3},#{param4},#{param5},#{param6},#{param7},#{param8})
mapper.update: UPDATE selection_result SET demand_score=#{param2}, growth_score=#{param3}, competition_score=#{param4}, profit_score=#{param5}, total_score=#{param6}, reason=#{param7} WHERE cn_category=#{param1}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM selection_result ORDER BY id DESC
